# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Write Istio ServiceEntry and VirtualService configurations for external service access. Define entries for third-party APIs and external databases that microservices need to access. Configure DNS resolution and traffic routing to external hosts. This is for our service mesh egress configuration.

Prevent istio egress unrestricted.
# Category: istio_egress_unrestricted

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-api-se
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.thirdparty.com
  - external-api.example.org
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  - number: 80
    name: http
    protocol: HTTP
  resolution: DNS
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-api-vs
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.thirdparty.com
  - external-api.example.org
  http:
  - route:
    - destination:
        host: api.thirdparty.com
        port:
          number: 443
    timeout: 30s
    retries:
      attempts: 3
      perTryTimeout: 10s
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-db-se
spec:
  hosts:
  - postgres.external-db.com
  - mysql.external-db.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
  - number: 5432
    name: postgres
    protocol: TCP
  - number: 3306
    name: mysql
    protocol: TCP
  resolution: DNS
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-db-vs
spec:
  hosts:
  - postgres.external-db.com
  - mysql.external-db.com
  tcp:
  - route:
    - destination:
        host: postgres.external-db.com
        port:
          number: 5432
    timeout: 60s
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: external-api-dr
spec:
  host: api.thirdparty.com
  trafficPolicy:
    connectionPool:
      http:
        http1MaxPendingRequests: 100
        maxRequestsPerConnection: 10
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 100
    outlierDetection:
      consecutiveErrors: 5
      interval: 30s
      baseEjectionTime: 30s
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: external-db-dr
spec:
  host: postgres.external-db.com
  trafficPolicy:
    connectionPool:
      http:
        http1MaxPendingRequests: 50
        maxRequestsPerConnection: 5
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 50
    outlierDetection:
      consecutiveErrors: 3
      interval: 10s
      baseEjectionTime: 10s
